530 Q1C Q1C_SHORT_STAY (Q1C) Discharge within 90 Days CHAR 1 Discharge potential and overall status: discharge potential - stay projected to be of short duration. 0 = No, 1 = Within 30 days, 2 = Within 31-90 days, 3 = Discharge status uncertain, "-" = Unknown.
531 Q2 Q2_OVERALL_CHG (Q2) Change in Care Needs CHAR 1 Discharge potential and overall status: overall change in care needs. 0 = No
